# AllOverIt.Reactive

## Purpose
This package contains utility extensions for use with System.Reactive.

## Package Metadata
- Project: Source/AllOverIt.Reactive/AllOverIt.Reactive.csproj
- Target frameworks: net10.0;net9.0;net8.0
- Tags: AllOverIt, Utilities, Reactive
- Depends on: AllOverIt

### Representative public types
- class DisposableExtensions
- class EventBus
- class EventBusHandler
- class ObservableExtensions
- class ObservableObject
- class ObservableProxy
- class PropertyNotifyExtensions
- interface IEventBus

### Representative extension methods
- DisposeUsing

- AllOverIt.Reactive

## Notes For Agents

- Verify runtime and target compatibility before suggesting package usage.
